territories.name: LLM Highlands
territories.description: The peaks of cognitive synthesis and linguistic modeling. Dominated by companies developing large language models and frontier AI research.

territories.name: Cloud Tundra
territories.description: The vast frozen plains of distributed storage and server farms. The backbone of the internet, providing the compute and storage necessary for all digital services.

territories.name: Semiconductor Archipelago
territories.description: The volcanic islands of pure compute and lithography. Where the physical hardware that powers AI and cloud is designed and manufactured.

territories.name: Cybersecurity Bastion
territories.description: The fortified mountains of digital defense and threat intelligence. Critical for protecting the integrity of the Global Stack.

territories.name: FinTech Nexus
territories.description: The high-speed canyons of digital value exchange and algorithmic markets. Where the economy of the Global Stack is settled.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.description: Leader in generative pre-trained transformers and creator of ChatGPT.

companies.name: Anthropic
strengths: Strong backing from Amazon and Google
weaknesses: Late to consumer market compared to OpenAI
companies.description: AI safety and research company focused on building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

companies.name: DeepMind
weaknesses: Focus often split between research and product
companies.description: Google's premier AI research division, responsible for many of the field's most significant breakthroughs.

companies.name: Mistral
weaknesses: Smaller capital base compared to US giants
companies.description: European champion of open-weight models, focusing on high performance with lower parameter counts.

companies.name: AWS
weaknesses: Perceived as a competitor by some retail/media partners
companies.description: The backbone of the modern internet and the largest cloud provider globally.

companies.name: Azure
strengths: Early lead in AI cloud services via OpenAI
companies.description: Enterprise-grade cloud solutions deeply integrated with the Microsoft software stack.

companies.name: GCP
companies.description: Data-centric cloud infrastructure leveraging Google's internal engineering excellence.

companies.name: Nvidia
companies.description: The forge of the AI revolution, providing the GPUs that power almost all modern AI training.

companies.name: TSMC
strengths: Trusted partner for all major chip designers
companies.description: The world's most advanced silicon foundry, manufacturing chips for Apple, Nvidia, and AMD.

companies.name: CrowdStrike
companies.description: Leader in cloud-delivered endpoint and workload protection.

companies.name: Cloudflare
companies.description: The security and performance layer for the modern web.

companies.name: Stripe
companies.description: The financial infrastructure for the internet.

companies.name: Coinbase
companies.description: The primary gateway for digital asset exchange and institutional crypto services.
